section_miscategorizations.reason: The plan to increase metformin conflicts with the Subjective statement that the patient has already been taking metformin 1000mg twice daily. This suggests either the S or P statement is inaccurate, but as written in P it reads as a new change rather than acknowledging current dose. This is more of an internal inconsistency than a pure section error, so it is a minor organizational issue rather than a clear misplacement of content type.
